name: @vanillagreen/pi-task-panel
description: Persistent Claude-style tasks panel for Pi with slash commands and a structured tasks_write tool.

settings.label: Enable task panel
settings.description: Register tasks_write, /tasks, task panel widgets, reminders, and shortcuts.

settings.label: Glyph style
settings.description: Glyphs for vstack-owned UI chrome. Unicode is the default; ASCII uses plain box/status/separator characters for terminal compatibility. pi-tool-renderer's global override wins when set.

settings.label: Default panel state
settings.description: Panel state when tasks first appear. User-hidden state is respected for the rest of the session.

settings.label: Use ctrl+t for tasks
settings.description: Register ctrl+t for task panel visibility. Pi normally uses ctrl+t for thinking visibility, so this requires reload and explicit opt-in.

settings.label: Alternate shortcut
settings.description: Always-available task panel shortcut when ctrl+t is not taken over. Restores the last visible mode when toggling in and keeps user-hidden state latched until then.

settings.label: Manager popup shortcut
settings.description: Keyboard shortcut that opens the interactive task manager popup. Use none to disable.

settings.label: Compact task count
settings.description: Maximum tasks shown in compact mode.

settings.label: Show active notes
settings.description: Show notes for the active task in expanded panel mode.

settings.label: Auto-show on first task
settings.description: Show the panel automatically only for the first non-empty task state in a session; user-hidden panels stay hidden until explicit show/toggle.

settings.label: Compact tasks_write output
settings.description: Render tasks_write results as a single inline status row instead of Pi's padded tool box.

settings.label: Task workflow reminders
settings.description: Inject task workflow reminders and hidden current task context so the agent reconciles active/done/dropped/follow-up tasks before final replies.

settings.label: Incomplete-task reminders
settings.description: Show a subtle reminder when an agent turn ends with incomplete tasks.

author: vanillagreen
